title: Crispy German Pork Stir-Fry
description: A fresh and juicy monsoon dish featuring crispy pork chops with toast slices, served as a snack option.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Place the seasoned pork chops into the skillet, skin-side down, and cook for about 4-5 minutes or until crispy under the skin.
Flip the pork chops to brown the other side, then place them in a baking dish. Bake at 400°F for an additional 8-10 minutes or until thoroughly cooked (internal temperature of 145°F).
Meanwhile, prepare toast slices by lightly toasting on both sides.
Serve crispy pork chops with toasted bread and garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
